path.aria-label: (ATAC-seq, scRNA-seq, genetic screens, CRISPR perturbations) (Neural recordings, brain imaging, AI/ML models) (Organelle organization, morphology, Intracellular dynamics)

g.aria-label: •Analysis requires high-throughput (large) datasets •Models often not generalizable across datasets •Models are biologically grounded, work with smaller, diverse datasets •Link multiple genetic causes to shared, targetable mechanism •Weak link to measurable biological covariates or mechanisms •Unclear path from model outputs to mechanistic interventions Acts as a translation layer between molecular findings and systems-level dysfunction
